content.sanskrit: ईशा वास्यमिदं सर्वं यत्किञ्च जगत्यां जगत् । तेन त्यक्तेन भुञ्जीथा मा गृधः कस्यस्विद्धनम् ॥
content.transliteration: īśā vāsyamidaṁ sarvaṁ yatkiñca jagatyāṁ jagat | tena tyaktena bhuñjīthā mā gṛdhaḥ kasyasviddhanam ||
content.text: All this, whatever moves in this moving world, is enveloped by the Lord. Therefore, find your enjoyment in renunciation; do not covet what belongs to others.
